title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Queen Elizabeth II Cup, and
everyone has their eyes on Daiwa Scarlet instead
of me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'll stay true to myself regardless! In order to
become my ideal princess, I'll send everyone
flying with a good wallop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm sure there are people out there who
support me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my secret special move, I'll seize the throne
to become the strongest queen ever! Hiyah!
Princess☆Dynamite!
